title: Retrieval Review: Color, Contrast, Meaning, and Gradients
summary: Retrieval Review: Color, Contrast, Meaning, and Gradients retrieves prior skills in an original changed theme and service-status constraints scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css color formats, css color relationships, css color contrast, css color not only, css gradients in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed theme and service-status constraints artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey color and status work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the survey color, contrast, and decorative-layer system here. */

options.text: Changed theme and service-status constraints case 1: different color notations create inherently different displayed colors.

Changed theme and service-status constraints case 1: convert equivalent values, choose a format that makes the intended manipulation clear, and calculate or inspect alpha against the actual background stack.
Changed theme and service-status constraints case 1: use eight-digit hex whenever contrast is weak because alpha automatically darkens text.
